items.title: 昆仑万维天工3.2发布Skywork Tags，AI智能体加入工作群聊
items.what: 昆仑万维天工3.2发布Skywork Tags，将AI智能体以团队成员身份接入Slack、飞书、钉钉、Discord、Telegram等即时通讯工具。团队可在原有工作群中@Skywork参与讨论，无需切换窗口或迁移数据。共享版Agent持续吸收多样上下文后表现反超精心调教的个人版，团队最终完全改用共享版。Skywork Tags不要求改变工作方式，让AI积累
items.why: 开发者、AI 工具重度用户、agent builder 和技术团队。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。

items.title: AI 版支付宝开放公测，蚂蚁阿宝无需邀请码即可体验
items.what: 支付宝阿宝 AI 助手今日正式开放公测，iOS 和安卓用户可在应用商店或支付宝 App 搜索"阿宝"或"蚂蚁阿宝"直接体验。开通后右滑进入新版，以对话方式安排办事，例如说出"查公积金"，阿宝会自动匹配对应小程序和服务入口，用户点击确认即可完成。支付宝承诺所有资金变动与支付环节均需用户本人确认，扫码、转账等功能已预留入口。
items.why: AI 行业观察者、产品经理、创业者和开发者。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。

items.title: Perceive-to-Reason: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Fine-Grained Visual Reasoning

markdown:
# 每日 AI/产品/开源动态 - 2026-07-02 ## 产品上新 1. [昆仑万维天工3.2发布Skywork Tags，AI智能体加入工作群聊](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/OqL6ID-mAel8XN-slYgXOA) - 信号：公众号：昆仑万维（天工） - 做什么：昆仑万维天工3.2发布Skywork Tags，将AI智能体以团队成员身份接入Slack、飞书、钉钉、Discord、Telegram等即时通讯工具。团队可在原有工作群中@Skywork参与讨论，无需切换窗口或迁移数据。共享版Agent持续吸收多样上下文后表现反超精心调教的个人版，团队最终完全改用共享版。Skywork Tags不要求改变工作方式，让AI积累 - 为什么需要：开发者、AI 工具重度用户、agent builder 和技术团队。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。 2. [AI 版支付宝开放公测，蚂蚁阿宝无需邀请码即可体验](https://www.ithome.com/0/971/469.htm) - 信号：IT之家（RSS） - 做什么：支付宝阿宝 AI 助手今日正式开放公测，iOS 和安卓用户可在应用商店或支付宝 App 搜索"阿宝"或"蚂蚁阿宝"直接体验。开通后右滑进入新版，以对话方式安排办事，例如说出"查公积金"，阿宝会自动匹配对应小程序和服务入口，用户点击确认即可完成。支付宝承诺所有资金变动与支付环节均需用户本人确认，扫码、转账等功能已预留入口。 - 为什么需要：AI 行业观察者、产品经理、创业者和开发者。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。 ## 开源热门 1. [calesthio/OpenMontage](https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage) - 信号：GitHub Trending - 做什么：World's first open-source, agentic video production system. - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。更可控地生成和编辑多媒体内容，减少黑盒式生成的返工。 ## 公司动态 暂无值得单列的条目。 ## 技术前沿 1. [The Control Plane Was the Point: Revisiting autofz in the LLM Era](https://yfu.tw/blog/en/autofz-revisited) - 信号：Lobsters AI - 做什么：

Comments

- 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 2. [Perceive-to-Reason: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Fine-Grained Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01191) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：Fine-grained visual reasoning remains challenging for vision-language models, especially when small but critical visual cues are buried in high-resolution images. - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 3. [MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01071) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：Memory has emerged as a cornerstone of modern LLM-based agents, supporting their evolution from single-turn assistants to long-term collaborators. - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 4. [The State-Prediction Separation Hypothesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01218) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：Transformers use the same forward computation stream to both predict the next token and store useful state for future token predictions. - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 5. [ELDR: Expert-Locality-Aware Decode Routing for PD-Disaggregated MoE Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00466) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：In prefill-decode (PD) disaggregated LLM serving, each request is assigned to a decode worker after prefill. - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 6. [ASPIRE: Agentic /Skills Discovery for Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00272) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：Traditional robot programming is challenging: it requires orchestrating multimodal perception, managing physical contact dynamics, and handling diverse configurations and execution - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 7. [AutoTrainess: Teaching Language Models to Improve Language Models Autonomously](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.31551) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：Training language models (LMs) remains a highly human-intensive process, even as frontier language model agents become increasingly capable at software engineering and other long-h - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 8. [Seed2.0 Model Card: Towards Intelligence Frontier for Real-World Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.00248) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：We present Seed2.0, a model series that takes a meaningful step toward solving complex, real-world tasks. - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 9. [When LLMs Read Tables Carelessly: Measuring and Reducing Data Referencing Errors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.32029) - 信号：HuggingFace Papers - 做什么：While large language models (LLMs) perform well on table tasks, they still make data referencing errors (DREs), i.e., incorrectly citing or omitting table values, despite understan - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 ## 行业观点 1. [Meta caps internal AI token spending](https://mlq.ai/news/meta-caps-internal-ai-token-spending-after-costs-approach-billions-in-2026) - 信号：Hacker News AI - 做什么：Article URL: https://mlq.ai/news/meta-caps-internal-ai-token-spending-after-costs-approach-billions-in-2026/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48754713 Points: 136 - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 2. ['It's like having a dumb friend': Young San Franciscans hate AI](https://www.sfgate.com/tech/article/san-francisco-ai-backlash-22325141.php) - 信号：Hacker News AI - 做什么：Article URL: https://www.sfgate.com/tech/article/san-francisco-ai-backlash-22325141.php Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48753927 Points: 40 # Comments: 13 - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 3. [Claude Fable 5 Promotional Access](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15424964-claude-fable-5-promotional-access) - 信号：Hacker News AI - 做什么：Article URL: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15424964-claude-fable-5-promotional-access Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48751978 Points: 95 # Comments: 80 - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 4. [ZCode: Claude Code from the Makers of GLM](https://zcode.z.ai/cn) - 信号：Hacker News AI - 做什么：Article URL: https://zcode.z.ai/cn Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48751752 Points: 272 # Comments: 13 - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 5. [Are readers generating fiction with AI models?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22748) - 信号：Hacker News AI - 做什么：Article URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22748 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48750247 Points: 36 # Comments: 60 - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 6. [Godot will no longer accept AI-authored code contributions](https://www.pcgamer.com/gaming-industry/open-source-game-engine-godot-will-no-longer-accept-ai-authored-code-contributions-we-cant-trust-heavy-users-of-ai-to-understand-their-code-enough-to-fix-it) - 信号：Hacker News AI - 做什么：Article URL: https://www.pcgamer.com/gaming-industry/open-source-game-engine-godot-will-no-longer-accept-ai-authored-code-contributions-we-cant-trust-heavy-users-of-ai-to-understan - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。 8.
